ORDER GRANTING MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION
MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-01-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

AMENDED PETITION TO COMPEL BINDING ARBITRATION AND FOR ATTORNEYS FEES OF $2700 AND COSTS AGAINST ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY; NOTICE OF PETITION FILED BY PETITIONER MABIN, CHARLES HEARING SET FOR MAR-01-2012 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
REPLY BRIEF & SUPPLEMENTAL DECL OF DAVID L. HART FILED BY PETITIONER MABIN, CHARLES

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER CHARLES MABIN'S AMENDED PETITION TO COMPEL BINDING ARBITRATION AND FOR ATTORNEYS FEES OF $2700 AND COSTS AGAINST ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY - THE COURT GRANTS THE PORTION THAT SEEKS ARBITRATION AND STAYS THE ACTION UNTIL THE CONCLUSION OF THE ARBITRATION. THE REQUEST FOR COSTS IS DENIED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD CSR #7077

calendar.matters:
Amended Petition To Compel Binding Arbitration And For Attorneys Fees Of $2700 And Costs Against Allstate Insurance Company; Notice Of Petition
Off Calendar Mar-01-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
David L. Hart, Esq., of the Law Office of David L. Hart, Tel. 650.355.3000, appearing for Petitioner and moving party.
Ira Spratley, Esq., of the Law Offices of Mark T. Lobre, Tel. 415.281.7107.x7107, appearing for Respondent and opposing party.

THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. The Court modified its tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER CHARLES MABIN'S Amended Petition To Compel Binding Arbitration And For Attorneys Fees Of $2700 And Costs Against Allstate Insurance Company - The court grants the portion that seeks arbitration and stays the action until the conclusion of the arbitration. The request for costs is denied. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077
